summary: Base W10 (~18 mpw, §4.C) — second post-deload step-up under the permanent Tue-lift / Wed-T / Thu-off template (Adj #92). Tue Hyp A logged: incline holds 145 (top of LP, +5→150 only on a cleaner set-3, Adj #107), rear-delt 130 bump landed (set 1 RIR 3 = prescribed, Adj #112), and both arm resets validated — preacher 60 ran clean (bump-eligible 65, Adj #109) and pushdown 20 cleared its hold (22.5 re-attempt eligible, pain-gated — elbow mild ≤4/10, §10.A clock stays reset, Adj #110). Wed threshold 2×15 @ T logged: work reps 7:49/7:38/mi at RPE 7/RIR 2-3, Zoom Fly 6/road, with mild post-run L Achilles soreness (Adj #113). Fri: the AM-gate passed (clean Achilles) and the long-owed standalone fresh-day run-MHR max test ran — 8-min build @ 8:00/mi then a 1-mile all-out (~7:00/mi, RPE 10), HR climbing to a peak of 191. **Peak 191 ties but does not exceed the rower-derived lock, so per the Adj #53 protocol the 191 working max and off-191 HR zones stand unchanged** — closes the long-open retest (Adj #9/#45/#53/#93/#96/#106). No pain anywhere AM/during/post. Sat queued: lat 160 (Adj #97), seated calf 345-eligible (Adj #102), Sat DB lat push toward 15 (Adj #99), chest fly bump-eligible (Adj #103). Holds: chest-supp row 75 reset (Adj #98), decline crunch BW (Adj #111).

days.note: Logged — easy 40 min @ 10:43 honest-Z1 + hill strides 7 × @ 4.5% grade (step up from 6@4%), cadence 183 held at 6:00/mi (no sprint overshoot); HR 166/168 tight & cool; no pain anywhere AM/during/post — Achilles + knees clean on the 2nd hill dose (Adj #106)

Logged — incline 145 hold (5/5/5 RIR 1/1/0, top of LP, Adj #107); rear-delt 125→130 bump landed (set 1 RIR 3 = prescribed, Adj #112); preacher reset 60 ran clean → bump-eligible 65 (Adj #109); pushdown 20 hold cleared (set 3 RIR 2) → 22.5 re-attempt eligible, pain-gated — elbow mild ≤4/10, §10.A clock stays reset (Adj #110); DB lat 30 hold (Adj #108), decline crunch BW hold (Adj #111)

Logged — work reps 7:49/7:38/mi, HR avg 179/177, power 256/263W, cadence 171/176, RPE 7/RIR 2-3; road, Zoom Fly 6. 4th straight T quick of the 7:50–7:55 nudge (Adj #77/#93), recalibration still deferred to W12 5K-TT. L Achilles mild dull soreness AFTER, below Adj #34 trigger — recheck AM (Adj #113)
Off (permanent, Adj #92) — rest day, no session logged.

Logged — AM-gate passed (clean Achilles); 8-min build @ 8:00/mi + 1-mi all-out ~7:00/mi RPE 10, HR climb 184→peak 191. Peak ties but doesn't exceed the rower lock → 191 + zones stand unchanged (Adj #53 protocol); closes the long-owed retest (Adj #9/#45/#53/#93/#96/#106). CD ~10 min, pace not clearly recorded. No pain anywhere AM/during/post (Adj #114).

Bumps: lat 155→160 (Adj #97), seated calf 345-eligible on a clean set 3 (Adj #102), Sat DB lat push toward 15 (Adj #99), chest fly bump-eligible on clean RIR 2 set 2 (Adj #103); ≥6h gap, push to Sun if the long was hard
Tyler 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily clamshell / bird-dog / side plank; walking fine
